name: pi-browser
description: Playwright-backed pi extension that registers the pi-browser tool
readme:
# pi-browser

A publishable [pi](https://pi.dev) package that registers a Playwright-backed browser tool named `pi-browser`.

It loads a single URL in headless Chromium and returns concise rendered output:

- `title`
- `finalUrl`
- `status` when available
- rendered `text`
- optional truncated `html`

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-browser
npx playwright install chromium
```

Then restart pi or run:

```text
/reload
```

Linux may need:

```bash
npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
```

## Local development

```bash
npm install
npx playwright install chromium
pi
```

This repo keeps:

- `extensions/pi-browser.ts` — publishable package entry
- `.pi/extensions/pi-browser.ts` — local auto-discovery shim for pi in this repo

## Tool inputs

- `url` — required
- `waitUntil` — `load`, `domcontentloaded`, `networkidle`, `commit`
- `timeoutMs`
- `waitForSelector`
- `waitForSelectorState` — `attached`, `detached`, `visible`, `hidden`
- `extraWaitMs`
- `mode` — `text` (default), `html`, `both`

## Example

```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com",
  "waitUntil": "load",
  "timeoutMs": 30000,
  "mode": "text"
}
```

## Publish

```bash
npm run typecheck
npm pack --dry-run
npm login
npm publish
```

For a scoped package, use:

```bash
npm publish --access public
```
